subject: ARALING_PANLIPUNAN
title: Historical Places as Evidence
objective: Gamitin ang mapa, larawan, bagay, at account upang ipaliwanag ang kahalagahan ng kathang-isip na site.
introduction: Paghambingin ang source, creator, date, purpose, at limitasyon. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Historical Places as Evidence”.
A key word used in the lesson “Historical Places as Evidence”.
A key word used in the lesson “Historical Places as Evidence”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Paghambingin ang source, creator, date, purpose, at limitasyon.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Paghambingin ang source, creator, date, purpose, at limitasyon.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

doesNotFit: Larawan na walang context ay buong katotohanan
Gumawa ng tunay na claim mula sa fiction

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

feedback.correct: Correct: Sino ang gumawa at kailan?
feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. Anong paboritong kulay ko? and Ilang badge ang meron? do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Historical Places as Evidence”?

options.text: Paghambingin ang source, creator, date, purpose, at limitasyon.
Larawan na walang context ay buong katotohanan
Gumawa ng tunay na claim mula sa fiction

items.explanation: The correct response is “Paghambingin ang source, creator, date, purpose, at limitasyon.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Paghambingin ang source, creator, date, purpose, at limitasyon.

options.text: Larawan na walang context ay buong katotohanan

items.explanation: The correct response is “dated photograph” because it follows the lesson explanation: Paghambingin ang source, creator, date, purpose, at limitasyon.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?

options.text: Larawan na walang context ay buong katotohanan

items.explanation: The correct response is “Larawan na walang context ay buong katotohanan” because it follows the lesson explanation: Paghambingin ang source, creator, date, purpose, at limitasyon.

items.prompt: Ano ang mahalagang itanong sa source?
items.explanation: The correct response is “Sino ang gumawa at kailan?” because it follows the lesson explanation: Paghambingin ang source, creator, date, purpose, at limitasyon.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?

options.text: Larawan na walang context ay buong katotohanan

items.explanation: The correct response is “oral account with speaker” because it follows the lesson explanation: Paghambingin ang source, creator, date, purpose, at limitasyon.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Historical Places as Evidence; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Historical Places as Evidence.
